title: Eliminate Searching for Bestsellers
goal: Continuously identify and address potential issues when users search for bestseller products and top brands, ensuring results are accurate, relevant, and aligned with user expectations.
description: We are running a new wave of tests focused on global top sellers to validate that search results surface the correct products and to identify and fix potential issues. In parallel, we will also explore different ways users search for top brands to further improve the search experience.
